title: AModPack - Default - 1.20.1
body: AModPack - Default - 1.20.1, created Andrey Gerasimov (Andrey Pepper) # For builders For builders: Allows the use of WorldEdit with visualization of selections, creating and using schemes with Litematica, quickly changing blocks by type with ItemSwapper, and randomizing blocks. # For YouTubers For YouTubers: Allows recording everything that happens around using Replay Mod and compiling it into a video, as well as hearing voice chat in Replay Voice Chat. # For players on server For players on servers: Allows communication in voice chat, seeing the contents of shulker boxes, custom models of items, avatars of players in chat, and joining different server versions.
